Motion For Writ Of Mandate And Partial Judgment On The First Amended Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of First Amended Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Sana Singh, Esq.(415) 621-2493 American Civil Liberties Union for Petitioner. (In-person)
Aseem Mehta, Esq. (415) 896-1701 Asian Americans Advancing Justice for Petitioner. (In-person)
David Tyra, Esq. 916-321-4500 Kroncik, Moskovitz, Tiedemann & Girard for Respondent CDCR.

ARGUED. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER AMERICAN CIVIL LIBERTIES UNION OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Writ Of Mandate And Partial Judgment On The First Amended Verified Petition For Writ Of Mandate.

Taken Under Submission.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)
